nodes.label: Tool Discovery via MCP tools/list
nodes.rationale: Ozy discovers tools of each connected downstream server by calling MCP tools/list, capturing name/title/description/input schema. Each tool is normalized to toolRef = <serverId>.<downstreamToolName>. ozy index populates the catalog and reports a summary of servers/tools indexed plus per-server failures. Each cataloged tool records lastIndexedAt, schemaHash, freshness marker, and server status.

edges.source_location: List and describe reflect discovered tools — describeTool
